description_long: This object is a small, vintage military-style SUV with a weathered, gray metallic exterior and a star insignia on the hood, reminiscent of classic Willys Jeeps used in mid-20th-century military operations. The vehicle features an open cabin with two front seats, a simple dashboard, and a thin steering wheel. The windshield is upright and split into two panes, and the rear of the vehicle includes a spare tire mounted externally along with a jerry can. The wheels are metallic with a unique, circular multi-spoke pattern and gold accents. The SUV has no roof or side doors, exposing the interior and seating area. The overall design is utilitarian, compact, and rugged, suitable for off-road or urban exploration.
description: A compact, vintage military-style SUV with a weathered gray finish, open cabin, and distinctive multi-spoke wheels. Features include a star insignia, spare tire, and exposed seating.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open cabin, upright windshield, star insignia on the hood, and detailed wheel design.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the spare tire, jerry can, and the open back of the vehicle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the steering wheel, open seating, and metallic wheels.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the split windshield, front grille, bumper, and star insignia on the hood.
attribute_wheel_design: Five circular multi-spoke metallic rims with gold accent rings
